zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Cooke於1422年出生在英國艾可洛福德時，他的父親Robert Cooke30歲，母親Katherine26歲。他與Elizabeth Malpas在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1465年登記服兵役。他於1460年在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 羅雅爾 艾可昌被列為member of parliament。他去世於1478年5月在英國米德萊可倫敦享年56歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Cooke于1422年出生在英国艾可洛福德时，他的父亲Robert Cooke30岁，母亲Katherine26岁。他与Elizabeth Malpas在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1465年登记服兵役。他于1460年在英国英格兰倫敦聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 羅雅爾 艾可昌被列为member of parliament。他去世于1478年5月在英国米德萊可倫敦享年56岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可。

nameMeanings.name: Cooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Cooke was born in 1422, in Romford, Essex, England, his father, Robert Cooke, was 30 and his mother, Katherine, was 26. He married Elizabeth Malpas in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1465. In 1460, his occupation is listed as member of parliament in St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, England, United Kingdom. He died in May 1478, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Cooke est né en 1422, à Romford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert Cooke, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Katherine, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Malpas à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1465. En 1460, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en mai 1478, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Cooke 1422 in Romford, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Cooke 30 und seine Mutter Katherine 26. Er hat in England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Malpas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1465 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1460 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament in St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb im Mai 1478 im Alter von 56 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Cooke è nato il nel 1422 nel Romford, Essex, England, il suo padre, Robert Cooke, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Katherine, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Malpas nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1465. Nel 1460, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel maggio 1478, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Cookeが1422年にイギリスエセックスロムフォードで生まれた時，父Robert Cookeは30歳，母Katherineは26歳であった。イギリスイギリスでElizabeth Malpasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1465年に兵役登録をした。1460年，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト バーソロメウ ビー ス ロイアル エクスチャンッジでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1478年5月にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで56歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Bartholomew by The Royal Excha: 영국 런던 런던 스트 바토롬w 비 테 로야 스창
ko.London, Greater London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 바토롬w 비 테 로야 스창
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Cooke(이)가 1422년 영국 에세스 롬퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Cooke(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine(은)는 26세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth Malpas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1465년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1460년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 바토롬w 비 테 로야 스창에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1478년 5월 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Cooke nasceu em 1422, em Romford, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Cooke, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Katherine, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Malpas em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1465. Em 1460, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em maio de 1478, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.London, Greater London, England: ст бартоломю би т рояль эксчанг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Cooke родился в 1422 г. в местности ромфорд, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Cooke было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Malpas в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1465 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1460 годуработал по профессии member of parliament в местности ст бартоломю би т рояль эксчанг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер май 1478 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Cooke nació en 1422, en Romford, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Cooke, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Katherine, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Malpas en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1465. En 1460, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en mayo de 1478, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Middlesex, Inglaterra.
